tldr_weapon: Light of Foliar Incision (BiS) / Iron Sting R5 (F2P)
intro: Alhaitham is a 5-star Dendro Sword DPS who uses Chisel-Light Mirrors to infuse his attacks with Dendro and deal massive Spread damage. As the Acting Grand Sage of the Akademiya, he's one of the strongest on-field DPS characters in the game, rivaling even Hyperbloom teams with his raw Spread damage. His mirror management creates a high skill ceiling — optimal rotations produce 3-mirror rain attacks that deal devastating AoE Dendro damage. For players willing to learn his mechanics, Alhaitham rewards with top-tier single-target and AoE performance.
weapon_bottom_line: Light of Foliar Incision is his signature, scaling with EM. Primordial Jade Cutter and Mistsplitter are strong alternatives. For F2P, Iron Sting R5 provides EM and DMG bonus — excellent value. Harbinger of Dawn R5 is a surprising budget option if you can maintain >90% HP.

weapons.name: Light of Foliar Incision
weapons.notes: Signature BiS. CRIT DMG + Normal ATK DMG scales with EM. Perfect for Spread Alhaitham.

weapons.name: Primordial Jade Cutter
weapons.notes: High CR + HP→ATK conversion. Universal stat stick. Makes building much easier.

weapons.name: Iron Sting R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. EM substat + 24% DMG bonus at R5. Craftable — no gacha needed.

weapons.name: Harbinger of Dawn R5
weapons.notes: Budget option. Massive CRIT stats at >90% HP. Needs a strong shielder (Zhongli).

artifact_why: Best for Spread teams. 14% ATK per different element + 50 EM per same element. Alhaitham usually gets 180 EM + 14% ATK in standard teams.
artifact_alt: 2pc Deepwood Memories + 2pc EM set (Gilded/Wanderer's) — if another teammate holds 4pc Deepwood. Easier to farm with good substats.

main_stats.sands_note: EM sands generally. ATK% sands if using high-ATK weapon like Jade Cutter.
main_stats.goblet_note: Always Dendro DMG for Spread damage.
main_stats.circlet_note: Target 70:150+ ratio. CR circlet usually needed unless using Jade Cutter.

sub_priority: 3. ATK% — nice to have but less priority
4. Energy Recharge — 120-130% for burst every other rotation

teams.name: Spread Hypercarry
teams.desc: Premium Spread team. Nahida provides EM buff + Deepwood shred. Yae/Fischl applies Electro for Quicken. Zhongli shields + further RES shred. Alhaitham triggers Spread on every mirror attack.

teams.name: Quickbloom
teams.desc: Hybrid team. Yelan provides Hydro for occasional Hyperblooms. Kuki triggers both Hyperbloom and maintains Quicken aura. Higher floor than pure Spread.

teams.name: Budget Spread
teams.desc: F2P-friendly. Dendro MC holds Deepwood. Fischl + Beidou provide off-field Electro. No 5-star supports needed — still very strong.

rotation_code: Nahida E+Q (EM buff + mark) → Zhongli hold E (shield) → Yae/Fischl E (Electro application) → Alhaitham Q → wait for 2 mirrors → E → 3-mirror NA spam (2 rain attacks) → Charged ATK → 3-mirror NA spam (2 more rain attacks) → Switch out
rotation_key: The goal is to maintain 3 Chisel-Light Mirrors for maximum rain attacks. Use Q→E→CA combo: Q generates 3 mirrors (wait for 2 to appear first), E adds 1 back, CA adds another. This gives 2 full 3-mirror windows.
mistakes: Not managing mirrors — losing 3-mirror state drops DPS by ~30%. Learn the Q→wait→E→CA combo.
Using Deepwood on Alhaitham — Deepwood should be on the support (Nahida/DMC). Alhaitham wants Gilded Dreams for personal damage.
Building ATK over EM — Alhaitham's A4 passive converts EM to DMG%. EM is more valuable than ATK for Spread teams.
Bursting without mirrors — always use Q with 0 mirrors for maximum projection attacks, then rebuild with E+CA.

seo.title: Alhaitham Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Alhaitham build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons, Gilded Dreams artifacts, Spread and Quickbloom teams, mirror management rotation guide.
